changelog:
- 色层数自由调节，支持 1–20 层，不再受限于固定模式
- 新增自定义配方编辑器，可手动设计配色方案并实时预览颜色效果
- 自定义配方支持历史记录，可一键复用到其他区域
- 配方搜索支持按层颜色模式匹配，快速定位目标配方
- 配方面板改版，替代配方与自定义配方分区展示
- 配方编辑器支持点击空白区域取消选中
- 修复 6 层及以上配置时模型预测与配方搜索不可用的问题
- 修复 8 色校准板无法生成的问题
- 修复自定义配方调色盘设置不生效的问题
changelog_en:
- Freely adjustable color layers (1–20), no longer limited to fixed modes
- New custom recipe editor with real-time color prediction
- Custom recipe history: reuse recipes across regions with one click
- Recipe search by layer color pattern for quick matching
- Revamped recipe panel with tabbed layout
- Recipe editor now supports deselecting by clicking empty area
- Fixed model prediction and recipe search unavailable for 6+ layer configurations
- Fixed 8-color calibration board generation failure
- Fixed custom recipe palette settings not taking effect
